summary: Iteration 3 frontend verification of Tennis Pro Analysis static marketing site. All 28 specific assertions from the review request PASS. Real TPA logo image is now rendered in both navbar and footer (wordmark removed), founder/coaching/baseline-device images are real elements (not PlaceholderBlocks), tournament section still uses a placeholder as required, section order is Hero → ProofBar → AboutSection → TPAIntro → Baseline → Coaching → Tournament → Pathways → Video → Contact, all eyebrows renumbered correctly (01–08), hero subtitle and CTAs ('Book a Session' / 'View Analysis') updated, Instagram channel resolves to https://instagram.com/tennisproanalysis (target=_blank) in both footer and Contact page, EN/TR toggle still works (TR hero subtitle and '01 — Kurucu' eyebrow verified), copy phrases 'Ali Zevkli is an international tennis coach...' and 'coaching expertise with data-driven analysis...' and 'Baseline Vision is one' all present, restrictions respected (no '500+', no newsletter/subscribe, no testimonial, email/phone still 'adding soon'), and all 8 routes load without errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx is approaching 566 lines — splitting each section (HeroSection, ProofBar, TPAIntro, BaselineSection, CoachingSection, TournamentSection, PathwaysSection, AboutSection, VideoSection, ContactCTA) into its own component file under /components/home/ would improve maintainability for future iterations.

Strings 'Real-time tracking. Reportable output.' and supporting paragraph in BaselineSection are hardcoded English in Home.jsx; if multi-language coverage matters, move to i18n/translations.js alongside other keys.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 fully passes. Note: many text checks need case-insensitive comparison because the design applies CSS text-transform: uppercase to most labels — comparing raw inner_text against the source-cased copy will produce false negatives. Use .lower() for assertions on visual text. All 8 routes (/, /tpa, /baseline-vision, /coaching, /tournament, /pathways, /about, /contact) load cleanly. Founder photo URL = ...RMLM2869.JPEG; coaching photo = ...Çalışma Yüzeyi 2.png; baseline device photo = ...Çalışma Yüzeyi 1.png; TPA logo = ...TPA-LOGO.jpg.
